pr.title: 11L EMA + GPTQ-lite + Legal Score-First TTT (1.1408 BPB)

output.summary: Legal chunk-based score-first TTT on the PR #414 stack, scoring each 32K-token chunk via sliding-window eval before SGD+cosine updates and GPTQ-lite quantization.
output.valOnlyReasoning: Trains exclusively on scored validation chunks following the legal TTT protocol rather than using a separate training split.
techniques: score-first chunked TTT with sliding-window evaluation
SGD with cosine LR decay, momentum, and gradient clipping per chunk
EMA + Tight SWA with GPTQ-lite int6 quantization
